name: Windows XP x64
info:
Windows XP x64

VM Author:
Nguyen Bao An Bui

Description:
Windows XP Professional x64 Edition (codenamed x64 Client) is a sub-edition of Windows XP designed for workstation computers running on top of the then-newly introduced AMD64 processor architecture, a superset of Intel's x86/IA-32 processor architecture developed by AMD that implements 64-bit wide memory address registers to overcome limitations imposed by 32-bit addresses, which had a maximum size of 4 GB.
Source: BetaWiki

QEMU Command:
-cpu core2duo -smp sockets=1,cores=4,threads=1 -m 512M -vga std -device rtl8139,netdev=n0 -netdev user,id=n0 -accel tcg,thread=multi -device ac97

Version:
21
